purpose: Controls air inlet flow and unloading operations for compressor load/unload control with pneumatic actuation

inputs.name: pneumatic_control_signal
inputs.description: Pneumatic pressure signal controlling valve position

outputs.name: filtered_air_flow
outputs.description: Air flow rate through inlet valve

states.name: inlet_valve_wear
states.description: Inlet valve health degradation due to mechanical wear from cycling operations

states.name: target_valve_position
states.description: Target valve position based on pneumatic control signal

states.name: actual_valve_position
states.description: Actual valve position tracking target with wear-induced lag

events.name: inlet_valve_stuck_closed
events.description: Inlet valve stuck in closed position preventing compressor loading

events.name: inlet_valve_does_not_close
events.description: Inlet valve fails to close during unload operation

events.name: inlet_valve_does_not_fully_open
events.description: Inlet valve fails to open completely during load operation

events.name: inlet_valve_malfunction_safety_valve_blow
events.description: Inlet valve malfunctioning causes safety valve to blow after loading

parameters.name: valve_wear_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for inlet valve wear degradation

parameters.name: valve_response_coefficient
parameters.description: First-order lag coefficient for valve position tracking

parameters.name: control_signal_threshold
parameters.description: Pneumatic signal threshold for valve opening

parameters.name: max_flow_rate
parameters.description: Maximum air flow rate through fully open valve

parameters.name: stuck_closed_threshold
parameters.description: Wear level threshold for stuck closed condition

parameters.name: closure_failure_threshold
parameters.description: Wear level threshold for closure failure

parameters.name: partial_opening_threshold
parameters.description: Wear level threshold for incomplete opening

parameters.name: safety_valve_threshold
parameters.description: Wear level threshold for safety valve activation

state_transition_logic: inlet_valve_wear decreases by (1.0 / valve_wear_timescale) * pneumatic_control_signal * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
actual_valve_position approaches target_valve_position using first-order lag with coefficient valve_response_coefficient, modified by inlet_valve_wear, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
event_logic: inlet_valve_stuck_closed occurs when inlet_valve_wear < stuck_closed_threshold and actual_valve_position < 0.1
inlet_valve_does_not_close occurs when inlet_valve_wear < closure_failure_threshold and actual_valve_position > 0.9 when target is 0.0
inlet_valve_does_not_fully_open occurs when inlet_valve_wear < partial_opening_threshold and actual_valve_position < 0.8 when target is 1.0
assumptions: Valve wear is primarily driven by pneumatic control signal cycling frequency and magnitude
Valve position responds with first-order lag dynamics affected by wear state
Air flow is proportional to valve position and reduced by wear degradation
Pneumatic control signal above threshold commands valve opening, below threshold commands closing
Valve failures manifest as position control degradation rather than complete mechanical failure
